title: prunus ilicifolia var. occidentalis
intro: Prunus ilicifolia var. occidentalis, also known as the California island scrub oak, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Channel Islands and coastal mountains of California. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its leaves, which contain flavonoids, tannins, and saponins that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus ilicifolia var. occidentalis include treating wounds, fever reduction, and relief from digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves, which can be used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits.
